prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ba1aa698`.
codex_response:
Implemented `ba1aa698` end-to-end. The corrected rule is: read the repeated vertical panels as sequential frames of one motif moving vertically, then output the next frame as a single panel. I discarded both summary hints because they describe an overlay of all observed motif rows, which does not match the official outputs; the official outputs contain one extrapolated future motif instead.

The generator stays close to the task family: fixed 16-row boards, 3-4 shared-border panels, 4/5-cell interiors, small centered motifs, and arithmetic vertical motion, including the official border-colored square variant. No new `arc2/dsl_ext.py` primitive was needed.

Verification passed: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`.
